title: Annual Investment Allowance Efficacy Review
body: "The Annual Investment Allowance (AIA) is a relief that can be claimed by businesses on the cost of plant and machinery. In 2018, a business could claim up to 100% of an investment up to a value of £200,000 to help reduce the potential tax liability for that business.    The 2018 research aimed to:      gather evidence on the efficacy of the AIA   the extent to which it is considered when investments are made   whether or not it is meeting its aims of increasing investment and simplifying tax affairs for SMEs    IFF conducted 21 in-depth interviews with 16 claimants of AIA from the 2015 to 2016 tax year, 3 non-claimants, and 2 ‘non-informed’ claimants to explore the reasons for not claiming AIA and any differences in their investment behaviour.   "
